title: Enhancement: Add Multi-Language Support for Travel and Taxi Apps
excerpt:

posts.author: YashSmith (Yash)
posts.cookedHtml:
Issue Description:
It would be great to add built-in multi-language support for travel, taxi booking, video streaming, and automotive service apps. Currently, users from different regions face difficulties navigating the app due to language barriers.

Expected Outcome:

  • Support for multiple languages in UI, notifications, and chat

  • Easy integration for new languages

  • Improved accessibility for global users

Additional Context:
This feature will enhance user experience, increase adoption in international markets, and make the app more inclusive.

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @YashSmith
Great suggestion. Built in multi language support would significantly improve accessibility and adoption for global users, especially in travel, mobility, and streaming apps.

Today, teams often handle this by localizing status and dropdown labels, creating language specific automations and notifications, and managing translations externally when building apps or chat experiences.

This would be a strong feature request for native support across UI, notifications, and messaging to better support international audiences.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Tuesday Wizard
